title: Official meeting
summary: 1st Meeting_Presentation of time schedule for the preparation of the 14 studies of the Masterplan for North Evia : 'Evia Meta'.  Prime Minister Mitsotakis emphasized, a "very specific and structured plan for the total reconstruction of northern Evia" , which "will constitute the model for a new way of understanding holistic development, using the institution of integrated spatial investments, so that all the initiatives we undertake are part of a specific plan that can leverage the comparative advantages of each region, and first and foremost give hope to the people who were tested in northern Evia that it is worth remaining in their place and that their children will have a better future than them".
